body_txt: In many works of fiction, there are creatures that are Immune to Bullets , Made of Iron , and in worst-case scenarios have no Kryptonite Factor . Even nuking them has no effect. But fear not, for while these creatures may be immune to fire , bullets , nuclear weapons , and MTV , these monsters still have one weakness... Themselves, or their own kind. There are ways of how this is accomplished: Sub-Trope of Mutual Disadvantage . Super-Trope to Magic Must Defeat Magic . The opposite of Tactical Rock–Paper–Scissors where each type of combatant has some other capable of curb stomping it. However, this can be a subtrope of Elemental Rock–Paper–Scissors if an element happens to be weak against itself. Compare Beat Them at Their Own Game , Hoist by His Own Petard , and Summon Bigger Fish . Contrast Like Cannot Cut Like and Counterpart Artifacts . May be a reason one becomes a Hunter of His Own Kind . See also Serial-Killer Killer , which usually doesn't involve the supernatural.
